title: 高松宮記念の後に・カワイイ頂上決戦へ

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Ehe, it really does feel good. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But it's not over yet. Tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The results of the first Cutie ♪ Derby will come in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, around noon, I finish counting the
likes and meet up with Curren Chan and Biko
Pegasus. Of course, they're streaming the results
announcement.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oof! I lost!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They had almost the same number of likes. Curren
Chan made more posts, which ended up just
barely pushing her ahead.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
All the same, I lost both the race and the Cutie ♪
Derby... There's no getting around it.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Curren. How did I lose?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... If I had to say, I'd say it's probably because
of the audiences we were aiming for.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Take me, for example. I'm always cute. And
everyone likes cute, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
As long as I put myself out there, I can reach
anyone. I think that's why I get so many likes from
people of all ages and genders.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But instead of reaching out to everyone you
could, you chose to stick with what you
personally think is fun.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Now I can play around and recreate scenes from
Carrot Ranger! All my fellow hero fans really
loved it too!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I see... I wasn't appealing enough to people
outside of my core audience.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's not necessarily a bad thing. It might not
have worked out for this competition, but that's
just because of the specific guidelines we set to
determine a winner.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, what's important is that the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen was more fun because
we raced together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: See? Look! ♪

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"For today's headline, please take a look at this
video!"

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: "Woooo! Chatter... Curren Chan!"

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"That was footage from yesterday's
Takamatsunomiya Kinen. We've received reports
that there were three times more spectators than
usual."

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
"I heard about that. One of the runners planned
some special project, which apparently brought
more people to the course."

text_block_list.name: Commentator B
text_block_list.text: "Cute Curren Chan!"

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"Huh?! Um, well, in any case, it looks like we'll
have to keep our eyes on the future sprints!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The race was so exciting that it even made the
news. Don't you think that's amazing?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And for that, I have to say thanks, Biko.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I-I see!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you too, Curren Chan. I've really grown
thanks to our battle.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
The next time we meet, I'll be an entirely new me.
And when that time comes... I'll definitely defeat
you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You're on! I'll be happy to squash your big
comeback before it begins. ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, Curren. You might fit the bad guy role
even more than I thought...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Bad guy? Awww, at least make me the Dark Lady
of Cuteness or something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Curren Chan wins the first battle of the
Cutie ♪ Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the war is hardly over. We go straight to a
diner for a strategy meeting.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, about my next race...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, about my next race...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna run in the Sprinters Stakes again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's unusual for Curren Chan to suggest a race
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There aren't that many G1 sprints so I was going
to suggest running the Sprinters Stakes again
myself, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think I mentioned before that I spoke with all
the Cutie ♪ Derby participants before I
announced it, right? Well...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
At that time, they all said they were planning to
run in the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think that makes for a super simple,
perfect next step?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm on a high after beating Biko.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna take this momentum and use it to go up
against everyone all at once! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle, Hishi Akebono, and Sakura
Bakushin O. They're all the absolute cream of the
crop.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, though. It's not like we need
different tactics for each of them, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, though. It's not like we need
different tactics for each of them, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's a sprint, after all. I can win if I just run faster
than everyone else... Right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not wrong, but the race isn't the only thing
we need to consider strategy-wise.
choice_data_list: You have to think about the Cutie ♪ Derby too.
You have to think about the Cutie ♪ Derby too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Likes are counted separately on each platform. This time, we only had to worry about UmaTok, but next time we'll have to keep track of every platform.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No worries there, either. Do you think I'm gonna
cut corners?
choice_data_list: No, and that's exactly why I'm worried.
No, and that's exactly why I'm worried.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But really, don't worry! I can already see that my
future's bright.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My victory against Biko went according to plan,
so now I just need to put together a dramatic
"final showdown." That'll make the Cutie ♪ Derby
an even bigger deal!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then, with everyone watching, I'll beat everyone
and jump straight to the top!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
After that, I'll forever live in everyone's hearts as
the most beloved runner ever!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll finally be able to show you how cute I am
standing amidst thunderous applause. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll finally be able to show you how cute I am
standing amidst thunderous applause. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan chooses an even harder path. We'll
find out what challenges await her along the way
to the Sprinters Stakes!
